LAW AND MOTION 302, SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT MEREDITH MALMQUIST'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS AND AMENDED COMPLAINT ON GROUNDS THE COURT HAS NO PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT HAS MADE ANY PURPOSEFUL CONTACT WITH PERSONS IN CALIFORNIA OR HAS MINIMUM CONTACT WITH CALIFORNIA THAT WOULD RENDER DEFENDANT SUBJECT TO THIS COURT'S JURISDICTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT MEREDITH MALMQUIST'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS AND AMENDED COMPLAINT ON GROUNDS THE COURT HAS NO PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT.

APPEARANCES: Anthony Harris, Esq. of The Law Office of Anthony Harris 510/827-8676 for pltf & opposing party; Jenny D. Smith, Esq. of Law Office of Dek Ketchum 650/368-2588 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT HAS MADE ANY PURPOSEFUL CONTACT WITH PERSONS IN CALFORNIA OR HAS MINIMUM CONTACT WITH CALIFORNIA THAT WOULD RENDER DEFENDANT SUBJECT TO THIS COURT'S JURISDICTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
